title: Federated Archives
description: A group of Archives that has agreed to provide access to their holdings via one or more common finding aids.

definitions.definition: A group of Archives that has agreed to provide access to their holdings via one or more common finding aids.
definitions.sources:
- [Reference Model for an Open Archival Information System (OAIS), Recommended Practice CCSDS 650.0-M-2, Magenta Book 2012](https://public.ccsds.org/pubs/650x0m2.pdf)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
